layout.name: spitAngle
layout.title: Spread
layout.tooltip: The directional range, in degrees, which the eggplant will spit out NPCs.  This range fans out from straight in the egg-plant's facing direction (value 0) to perpendicular to the egg-plant (value 180).

layout.name: projectileSpeed
layout.title: Projectile Speed
layout.tooltip: The speed that NPCs will be spit out at.

layout.name: spitBlanks
layout.title: Spit Blanks?
layout.tooltip: When checked, the egg-plant will attempt to spit at regular intervals regardless if it has reached its Spawn Limit. If unchecked, the egg-plant will only spit when under its Spawn Limit.

layout.name: dontRender
layout.title: Don't render?
layout.tooltip: When checked, the egg-plant won't be visible even when not hidden.

layout.name: silent
layout.title: Silent?
layout.tooltip: When checked, the egg-plant won't play sound effects.

layout.name: projBlockCollision
layout.title: Spit NPCs have block collision?
layout.tooltip: When checked, NPCs spit by the egg-plant will collide with blocks.

layout.name: initDelayTicks
layout.title: Initial Delay
layout.tooltip: Number of frames the egg-plant waits before starting spit attempts.

layout.name: fireDelayTicks
layout.title: Timer
layout.tooltip: Number of frames the egg-plant waits between spit attempts.

layout.name: spawnLimit
layout.title: Spawn limit
layout.tooltip: Number of NPCs that the egg-plant can generate at a time;  it will not spit out any more until one or more of the NPCs it generated is killed or despawns.
